pi_items.verified_value: Unclear/Mixed: BBBC030 exists but is NOT a wound healing/scratch assay dataset. BBBC030 contains 60 DIC images of Chinese Hamster Ovary (CHO) cells at initial attachment stage, not scratch assays. The correct BBBC wound healing dataset is BBBC019 (Collective cell migration). The URL in setup_task.sh (https://data.broadinstitute.org/bbbc/BBBC030/BBBC030_v1_images.zip) returns 404; correct URL is https://data.broadinstitute.org/bbbc/BBBC030/images.zip. If download fails, setup falls back to synthetic data (ImageMagick-generated noise + rectangle).
pi_items.source: Web search of bbbc.broadinstitute.org/BBBC030 and bbbc.broadinstitute.org/BBBC019; HTTP HEAD request to BBBC030 URLs; setup_task.sh analysis lines 41-75
verifier.py line 197: `if ratio > 1.2:` - scoring logic checks if cell texture std dev / wound texture std dev > 1.2

pi_items.verified_value: BBBC019 is the correct Broad Bioimage Benchmark Collection dataset for wound healing/cell migration studies. BBBC019 contains 171 wound healing images (DIC and phase contrast) from multiple cell types (DA3, MDCK, HEK293T, melanoma cells).

privileged_info_summary: The task claims data_source is BBBC030, but BBBC030 is a dataset of 60 DIC images of Chinese Hamster Ovary cells at initial attachment, not wound healing/scratch assay images. The correct BBBC wound healing dataset is BBBC019 (171 images, DIC and phase contrast). The setup script attempts to download from a non-existent URL (BBBC030_v1_images.zip returns 404); the correct BBBC030 URL is data.broadinstitute.org/bbbc/BBBC030/images.zip. However, if download fails, the script falls back to synthetic data generation using ImageMagick (noise-based cellular texture plus a white rectangle as the wound). The texture_ratio_threshold of 1.2 is correctly used in verifier.py line 197. The output file paths are correct.
